docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KETTLE, DEBRA AKA DEBRA E WARD AKA DEBRA E WARDBEALS AKA DEBRA E BEALS AKA DEBRA E WARD-BEALS AKA MITCHELL M KETTLE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-15-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-22-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANTHONY L. HEAD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-12-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-03-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RHONDA FUNG. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-29-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY ANTHONY LEE HEAD. THE APR-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-29-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-29-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-31-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-31-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-25-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JUL-31-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-25-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). SEP-25-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-20-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
